task: Howdy, this session we need to carefully investigate our ability to update all of our 3rd party dependencies as long as it is safe to do so. There are currently several PRs created by dependabot (https://github.com/oddessentials/ado-git-repo-insights/pull/253 to 258). Let's resolve all of these updates in a single branch, create a new PR and close these old ones. Thoughtfully investigate Typescript, Python, and all of our other dependencies prior to making any assumptions. When you are confident in the strategy and have verified what needs updating, show me a consolidated plan.
FYI, I just created a new branch for us and got latest from main merged into it
1. A. 2. absolutely. let's get everything up to date. 3. yes
user_feedback_text: 1. A. 2. absolutely. let's get everything up to date. 3. yes
